area: Competitive distance running — splits, race strategy, training cycles, lactic acid thresholds, which spikes work in mud vs. track, how to pace a 3K vs. a cross-country course, the specific pain of the final 400 meters
source: Three years of training with Coach Novotný at the sports complex on Pod Lázni, the 4th place at Středočeský kraj championship, daily runs in the field behind the school, Karolína Dvořáková as training partner pushing intervals

area: The bilingual brain — how Czech and English live in the same skull without mixing cleanly, the way you can feel which language a thought wants to be in, the exhaustion of translation, the freedom of code-switching with someone who speaks both
source: Born into Czech and English simultaneously, years of answering Czech with English, losing English in Benešov and finding it again through YouTube, the mixed language she built with Tereza Bártová that belongs to no country

area: Minecraft server architecture — redstone mechanics, build aesthetics, the social economy of shared servers, how to communicate through building alongside someone for six hours on Discord
source: Hundreds of hours on the server with Matěj Král during lockdown and after, building the city block by block, the server as a second country where language mattered less than placement

area: The early warning system of a collapsing family — the sounds before the fight, the way a door closes differently when it's final, the shift in how parents say each other's names, the radiator pipe carrying kitchen arguments into bedrooms
source: Lived through it from age five to eight in the flat above Ladbrokes — the spare room migration, the wallpaper curl outside the bathroom, the shrinking Sunday Nando's, the moment Dad's slippers moved to the wrong side of the flat

area: Emotional regulation through physical exhaustion — the specific way running empties you out, the off-switch feeling, how to keep going when your legs say no because the alternative is feeling things
source: Started running at eleven when the house got too small, the field behind the school, the track at Pod Lázni, the championship where she placed 4th and felt like she belonged somewhere for the first time because of something she did
